title: diaprio #1282
definition:
1) to saw asunder or in two, to divide by a saw
 2) to be sawn through mentally, i.e. to be rent with vexation
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to saw asunder or in two, to divide by a saw
 2) to be sawn through mentally, i.e. to be rent with vexation

    NASB:  to saw asunder, cut to the heart:
